ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_picture" TEXT /* Picture or logo of the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "challenges" (
  "challenge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each challenge */,
  "challenge_name" TEXT /* Name of the challenge */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the challenge */,
  "rules" TEXT /* Rules and guidelines for the challenge */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the challenge */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the challenge */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the challenge (e.g., active, completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("challenge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "challenge_teams" (
  "challenge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the challenge */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("challenge_id", "team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the participant */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the participant (e.g., team leader, member) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_participants" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the participant in the team (e.g., team leader, member) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team making the submission */,
  "challenge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the challenge the submission is for */,
  "submission_file" TEXT /* File path to the submission file */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date and time the submission was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the submission (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_challenge_id FOREIGN KEY ("challenge_id") REFERENCES challenges ("challenge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the submission being scored */,
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the judge providing the score */,
  "score" REAL /* Score given to the submission */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the judge */,
  "score_date" TEXT /* Date and time the score was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_judge_id FOREIGN KEY ("judge_id") REFERENCES judges ("judge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_submission_id FOREIGN KEY ("submission_id") REFERENCES submissions ("submission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "judges" (
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each judge */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the judge */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the judge */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the judge */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise of the judge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("judge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "judge_challenges" (
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the judge */,
  "challenge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the challenge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("judge_id", "challenge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sender */,
  "receiver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the receiver */,
  "message_content" TEXT /* Content of the message */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date and time the message was sent */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Read status of the message (true if read, false if unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES organizers ("organizer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_receiver_id FOREIGN KEY ("receiver_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "announcements" (
  "announcement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each announcement */,
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organizer making the announcement */,
  "announcement_content" TEXT /* Content of the announcement */,
  "posted_date" TEXT /* Date and time the announcement was posted */,
  "is_important" INTEGER /* Indicates if the announcement is important (true or false) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("announcement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_announcements_organizer_id FOREIGN KEY ("organizer_id") REFERENCES organizers ("organizer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizers" (
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organizer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the organizer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the organizer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the organizer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organizer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., create, read, update, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "challenge_tags" (
  "challenge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the challenge */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("challenge_id", "tag_name")
)
